description: Product Description If you're someone who's always on the go, constantly running from one place to the next, you know how important it is to have a reliable and efficient food storage solution. Enter the Box Set - the perfect three-piece food storage solution that is designed to make life on the go that much easier. With three different sizes, each with a unique and vibrant design, the Box Set is a must-have for anyone who loves to keep their snacks and meals organized and fresh. The Box Set is designed in the UK, and each size comes with a unique and vibrant design that is sure to brighten up any mealtime. The designs are playful, colorful, and licensed, featuring popular brands and characters that everyone will love. From Simon’s Cat to Minecraft , there's a design for everyone in the Box Set collection. Let's start by talking about the sizes. The Box Set comes with three different sizes - an M size, a Large size, and a Small size. The M size measures 5x10x10 cm, making it the perfect size for storing small snacks such as nuts, berries, or energy bites. This size is compact and lightweight, making it easy to carry around and snack on the go. The Large size measures 5.5x11.5x11.5cm, making it perfect for storing larger snacks or meals such as sandwiches, salads, or wraps. The Large size is spacious enough to hold all your favorite foods while still being compact enough to fit into most bags or lunch boxes. Finally, the Small size measures 4.5x8.5x8.5cm, making it perfect for storing small snacks or sides such as hummus, fruit, or veggies. The Small size is great for keeping your snacks organized and separate from your main meal. Now let's talk about the materials. The Box Set is made from food-safe Polypropylene, which is BPA-free and safe for storing all types of food. This means that you can store your snacks and meals with confidence, knowing that they are not only fresh but also free from harmful chemicals. Polypropylene is a durable and long-lasting material that can withstand wear and tear, making the Box Set a reliable and long-lasting food storage solution. It's important to note that the Box Set is not dishwasher safe, but it's easy to clean with soap and water. Simply rinse each container with warm water and soap, and they'll be ready to use again in no time. One of the best features of the Box Set is that each size can be stored inside the other, making it easy to store and transport when not in use. This means that the Small size can be stored inside the Medium size, and the Medium size can be stored inside the Large size, saving valuable space in your kitchen or backpack. The Box Set is not just a great food storage solution for those on the go. It's also a great option for meal prepping and keeping your meals organized and fresh throughout the week. Whether you're looking to store snacks for a road trip or pack a healthy lunch for work or school, the Box Set is the perfect solution. In conclusion, the Box Set is a versatile and practical food storage solution that is perfect for anyone looking to stay organized and eat on the go. With three different sizes, vibrant designs, and food-safe materials, the Box Set is a must-have for anyone looking to make mealtime more fun and convenient. Start enjoying your favorite meals and snacks wherever you go!
